branches.name: Medical Sciences
branches.description: Oxford's Medical Sciences Division is a world-leader in biomedical research and clinical training, famously developing the Oxford-AstraZeneca vaccine.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: Saïd Business School is a top-tier global business school that blends traditional academic excellence with entrepreneurial innovation.

branches.name: Humanities
branches.description: The Faculty of Humanities at Oxford is one of the world's most prestigious, covering deep research in philosophy, history, and literature.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Oxford Law is world-renowned for its rigorous academic standards and produces elite leaders in international law and the judiciary.

branches.name: MPLS (Science)
branches.description: The Mathematical, Physical and Life Sciences Division leads global innovation in AI, quantum computing, and climate science.

branches.name: Technology & CS
branches.description: Cambridge is Europe's tech hub, with the Department of Computer Science leading in AI foundations and 'Silicon Fen' industry ties.

branches.name: Clinical Medicine
branches.description: The School of Clinical Medicine is integrated with world-leading research institutes at the Cambridge Biomedical Campus.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: Judge Business School provides an intensive, collaborative learning environment known for its focus on experiential learning and consulting.

branches.name: Biological Sciences
branches.description: A global leader in genomics, stem cell research, and evolutionary biology.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Cambridge Law is one of the oldest and most respected faculties in the world, with a heavy emphasis on legal theory and international rights.

branches.name: Engineering
branches.description: The world's premier engineering faculty, leading in aerospace, mechanical, and civil engineering with cutting-edge laboratories.

branches.name: Computing
branches.description: Imperial Computing is a global leader in software engineering and AI, with massive industry recruitment from Silicon Valley.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: Imperial College Business School blends tech-driven analytics with modern commerce, ideal for future fintech and strategy leaders.

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: One of Europe's largest medical schools, providing unparalleled clinical experience in London's major teaching hospitals.

branches.name: Natural Sciences
branches.description: Leading research in theoretical physics, chemistry, and climate math with 14 Nobel Prize laureates associated with the faculty.

branches.name: Engineering Sciences
branches.description: UCL Engineering is a dynamic multidisciplinary faculty known for its 'Integrated Engineering Programme' and high research output.

branches.name: The Bartlett (Design)
branches.description: Consistently ranked as the world's best school for architecture and the built environment, focusing on urban sustainability.

branches.name: Laws
branches.description: UCL Laws is a leader in research-led teaching, situated in the heart of London's legal district.

branches.name: Social & Historical
branches.description: Global leaders in economics, geography, and political science with a focus on solving modern societal challenges.

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: UCL Medical School is at the forefront of medical training, partnering with 7 major London hospitals.

branches.name: Economics
branches.description: The world's most prestigious economics department, producing more Nobel Prize winners in the field than any other UK institution.

branches.name: Government & Politics
branches.description: A global powerhouse for political science and public policy research, situated minutes from Westminster.

branches.name: Finance
branches.description: LSE Finance is the ultimate target for investment banking, known for its extreme rigor and elite job placement in the City.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Renowned for international corporate law and human rights, with a highly international student body.

branches.name: Sociology
branches.description: Leading global research in social theory, urban studies, and data science for society.

branches.name: Engineering
branches.description: A research powerhouse in materials science (birthplace of Graphene) and advanced manufacturing systems.

branches.name: Alliance Business
branches.description: Alliance Manchester Business School is a leader in business research and project-led learning with a global campus network.

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: One of the largest medical schools in the UK, focusing on patient-centered learning and clinical excellence.

branches.name: Science
branches.description: Strong programs in physics, chemistry, and environmental science with a large focus on industrial application.

branches.name: Humanities
branches.description: Expansive faculty covering history, linguistics, and international relations with a focus on global development.

branches.name: Informatics (CS & AI)
branches.description: One of the world's most prestigious schools of informatics, leading in AI, robotics, and natural language processing.

branches.name: Medicine & Vet Med
branches.description: Rich in history and innovation, particularly in regenerative medicine and veterinary biosciences.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: Edinburgh Business School is known for its focus on entrepreneurship, finance, and social responsibility.

branches.name: Science & Engineering
branches.description: Leading research in energy systems, astronomy, and chemical engineering.

branches.name: Arts/Humanities
branches.description: A global leader in English literature, history, and the arts with strong ties to the Edinburgh Festival.

branches.name: Warwick Business (WBS)
branches.description: WBS is a top-tier business school known for its excellence in finance, management, and strategy research.

branches.name: WMG (Engineering)
branches.description: Warwick Manufacturing Group is a world leader in collaborative research between academia and global industry partners.

branches.name: Mathematics
branches.description: One of the UK's powerhouse math departments, with strong programs in pure math and statistics.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Warwick Law is known for its 'Law in Context' approach, examining law within its social and global environment.

branches.name: Social Sciences
branches.description: Strong rankings in economics, politics, and sociology with a focus on global sustainability.
